assertions.title: DiscoveryView reads selected agent type before connecting

steps.expected: In the .sshThenRemote case, code reads AgentSelectionStore.shared.selectedAgentType(for: server.id) and passes it to connectViaSSH
steps.observed: Found at line ~841: case .sshThenRemote(let host, let credentials): ... let agentType = AgentSelectionStore.shared.selectedAgentType(for: server.id) ... connectedServerId = try await connectViaSSH(server: server, host: host, credentials: credentials, agentType: agentType)

evidence.codeSnippet:
case .sshThenRemote(let host, let credentials):
    startedAsyncBootstrap = true
    let agentType = AgentSelectionStore.shared.selectedAgentType(for: server.id)
    connectedServerId = try await connectViaSSH(server: server, host: host, credentials: credentials, agentType: agentType)

assertions.title: Agent type passed through connectViaSSH to sshConnectAndConnectServer

steps.expected: Method accepts agentType: AgentType? = nil parameter and forwards it to sshConnectAndConnectServer()
steps.observed: Found at line ~855: private func connectViaSSH(server:host:credentials:agentType: AgentType? = nil) calls sshConnectAndConnectServer(..., agentType: agentType)

assertions.title: Agent type reaches FFI sshStartRemoteServerConnect call

steps.expected: Method accepts agentType: AgentType? = nil and passes it to appModel.ssh.sshStartRemoteServerConnect() in BOTH .password and .key cases
steps.observed: Found at line ~973: method accepts agentType: AgentType? = nil. In .password case (line 990): passes agentType: agentType. In .key case (line 1005): passes agentType: agentType. Both branches confirmed.

steps.action: Verify FFI method signature includes agentType parameter
steps.expected: Generated UniFFI SshBridge protocol declares sshStartRemoteServerConnect with agentType: AgentType? parameter
steps.observed: Confirmed in UniFFICodexClient.generated.swift line 2992: func sshStartRemoteServerConnect(..., agentType: AgentType?) async throws -> String

summary: All 3 assertions passed. The agent type selection flows correctly from AgentSelectionStore through connectToServer → connectViaSSH → sshConnectAndConnectServer → sshStartRemoteServerConnect (FFI) in both .password and .key credential branches.
